title: coreopsis minima
intro: Coreopsis minima, also known as dwarf coreopsis, is a low-growing perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Coreopsis minima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Coreopsis minima can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
